name: Garden-Good Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip the ends off the green beans and halve them lengthwise, then crosswise.
2. In a medium saucepan, sauté the onion in butter until it is soft.
3. Stir in the beans; toss until they are shiny and moist.
4. Add the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
5. Cover and cook for 10 minutes or until the beans are just crisply tender. Serve.
